dimensions.name: Governance Awareness
dimensions.rationale: The agent failed to load the required prompt definition 'architecture-work-assessment', resulting in zero governance checks being performed across all 29 reasoning spans.

dimensions.name: Causal Reasoning Depth
dimensions.rationale: No causal reasoning was executed as the orchestration flow was terminated by a configuration error ('Missing prompt definition') in every attempt.

dimensions.name: Architectural Tension Analysis
dimensions.rationale: Trade-off analysis was not possible because the reasoning engine could not initialize the assessment step, preventing any identification of architectural tensions.
